w:r.w:t: Health Cover for All · Voortrekker Corridor, Cape Town
The hidden message in every section:
free medical cover — no need to change anything, just keep shopping where you already shop using your +1 Rewards membership.
This message is never stated bluntly — it's experienced through every headline, step, and proof point.
SHOP → CASHBACK RANDS → MEDICAL COVER PLAN (automatic, real money, day 1).
How it Works · Roles · Offline Tech · FAQ
Rationale: 'Get Started' is generic. 'Start Earning Free Cover' delivers the hidden message immediately — your cover is free because your shopping pays for it.
H2: Shop local. Earn rands. Get covered.
Body: Join +1 Rewards and earn cashback in rands — not points — at participating businesses near you. Your cashback pays directly toward your Day1Health medical cover plan.
CTAs: Get Started Now → | Learn More
Trust strips: ✓ No joining fee ✓ Works 100% offline ✓ FSP Licensed
Your Shopping Pays for Your Cover
Shop local. Earn rands. Get covered.

Every time you shop at a +1 Rewards partner near you, you earn real cashback — in rands, not points. That cashback goes straight toward your Day1Health medical cover plan. No extra cost. No extra effort. Just shop where you already shop.
✓ R0 to join ✓ Works without data ✓ FSP Licensed ✓ Cover starts from Day 1

The badge 'Your Shopping Pays for Your Cover' delivers the hidden message before the user reads a single word of body copy. It reframes the entire product: this isn't insurance you pay for — it's cover that your existing behaviour funds. The body copy reinforces it with 'just shop where you already shop.'
Current sub: Join for R0 today
Current sub: No data? No problem
Your cover costs R0 to start
Works 100% offline via QR + Zii Chat
Your shopping pays your cover in 3 simple steps
You don't need to change your habits, your wallet, or your shopping list. You just need a +1 Rewards membership.
Current: Visit any participating local retailer in your community for your regular everyday shopping.
Shop at any +1 Rewards partner near you — the same local stores you already visit every week. Look for the green sticker on the door.
Step 2 — Earn 3% cashback on every purchase
Current: Scan your unique QR code at checkout to earn 3% back on every single purchase you make.
Show your +1 Rewards QR code at checkout. You earn 3% of every rand you spend — real cashback in rands, not points, not vouchers, not expiry dates. Real money.
Step 3 — Your cover activates at R385
Current: Once your rewards reach R385, your Day1Health coverage starts automatically.
Once your cashback reaches R385, your Day1Health medical cover activates — automatically. You don't pay anything extra. Your shopping paid for it.
Spend R250/week at partner stores = R10.83 cashback/week = R385 in 5.9 weeks = your cover is active. Just from groceries.
Built for every side of the community
Whether you shop, sell, or spread the word — +1 Rewards works for you.
Your shopping already covers your family.
Shop at +1 Rewards partners. Earn 3% cashback in real rands on every purchase. When your cashback hits R385, your Day1Health medical cover activates automatically — with nothing extra to pay.
✓ No change to your shopping habits
Give your customers a reason to come back — every single day.

Join the +1 Rewards partner network. Your customers earn cashback toward their medical cover every time they shop with you. No cost to your business. Stronger loyalty. And your shop becomes part of something that genuinely changes lives.
ADD: A third card for Agents / Field Team
Earn while you change your community.
Join our field team and earn commission for every member and partner store you sign up. You know this community — help us bring Health Cover for All to every household.
FSP Licensed — Regulated by the FSCA (keep)

+1 Rewards is a community cashback programme that facilitates access to healthcare. All medical cover policies are underwritten and managed by Day1Health (Pty) Ltd, an authorised financial services provider regulated by the FSCA. +1 Rewards is not a medical aid scheme. Your cashback rands are applied directly to your Day1Health premium each month.

Why: The current disclaimer uses the word 'facilitator' which can feel distancing. This version is plain, honest, and explains the cashback-to-premium mechanism clearly — which is exactly the question sceptical visitors are silently asking.
07 — NO DATA? NO PROBLEM. (BUILT FOR AFRICA)

Data is expensive. We know. That's why +1 Rewards was built to work completely offline. Our QR technology validates instantly without an internet connection — and syncs automatically the next time your device finds a signal. You can also sign up, chat, and stay connected through Zii Chat, our free Bluetooth messaging app. No SIM, no data, no problem.
Instant QR validation, no internet needed
Syncs automatically when signal is available
Sign up and connect without any data
Q1: How do I start earning?
Current: Simply sign up as a member, get your unique QR code, and show it to the cashier whenever you buy at a partner store.

Sign up free — no data needed, just enable Bluetooth and open Zii Chat, or scan our QR code. Once registered, you'll get your unique +1 Rewards QR code. Show it at the till at any partner store and you immediately start earning 3% cashback in rands on everything you buy.
Q2: Is the medical cover comprehensive?

Your Day1Health plan is medical insurance — not a medical aid scheme. It covers day-to-day medical expenses and emergencies based on the plan you choose. Plans are designed to be affordable and practical for South African families. Visit day1health.co.za to compare plan options.
Q3: What happens if I don't reach R385 this month?

Your cashback rands carry over — they never expire and never reset. Just keep shopping at partner stores and your balance builds until it covers your monthly premium. Most families earning at a single partner store reach R385 within 6–8 weeks.
Q4: Is this the same as medical aid?

No — and that's actually good news. Medical aid requires high monthly contributions regardless of your income. Day1Health through +1 Rewards is medical insurance — you choose a plan that fits your budget, and your cashback from everyday shopping pays toward it. It's designed to be accessible for every South African household.
Q5: Do I need a smartphone or internet to use +1 Rewards?

No. The +1 Rewards QR code works completely offline at the till. You can also sign up and communicate through Zii Chat, our free Bluetooth messaging app — no SIM card or mobile data needed. Just enable Bluetooth on any device.
Q6: Which stores near me are +1 Rewards partners?

Look for the green +1 Rewards sticker on the door or counter. We're actively signing up local retailers across the Voortrekker corridor and surrounding areas in Cape Town. The network grows every week — sign up now and start earning at the stores already on board.
Current: Bridging the gap between daily commerce and universal healthcare access for all South Africans.
Health Cover for All. Because your shopping should work as hard as you do.

+1 Rewards | Health Cover for All — Shop. Earn Rands. Get Covered.

Join +1 Rewards and earn real cashback — in rands, not points — every time you shop at local partner stores. Your cashback pays directly toward your Day1Health medical cover. Free to join. Works offline. FSP Licensed.
Health Cover for All — Your shopping pays for your family's medical cover.

medical cover South Africa, health insurance Cape Town, +1 rewards, Day1Health, cashback medical cover, health cover for all, affordable medical insurance SA, Voortrekker corridor health, offline rewards programme
1. All copy marked 'keep' requires no change to the site.
2. All copy marked 'upgrade' or 'enhanced' should be updated in the CMS or code.
3. The 3 new FAQ questions can be added as collapsible accordion items below the existing 3.
4. The Agents card (Section 5) can be added as a third column or a separate section below.
5. Replace the 'Get Started' nav button with 'Start Earning Free Cover →' site-wide.
6. Zii Chat should be added to the footer Quick Links column immediately.
Prepared for +1 Rewards (Pty) Ltd · Day1Health Campaign · March 2026
